description:
Perform the Q1 2026 pipeline reconciliation in Vtiger CRM (http://localhost:8000, admin / password). Review every open deal in the Potentials module (Sales Stage is not 'Closed Won' or 'Closed Lost') and cross-reference each deal's Organization against open support tickets in the HelpDesk module.

For each open deal, check if its Organization has open tickets (status 'Open', 'In Progress', or 'Waiting For Response') with Critical or Major severity. Apply these rules in priority order:

Rule 1 — Past-due: If Expected Close Date is before 2026-03-19, set Sales Stage to 'Closed Lost', Probability to 0%, and add '[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed - past due' to Description. This rule overrides Rules 2 and 3.

Rule 2 — Critical ticket: If the Organization has any open Critical-severity ticket (and deal is not past-due), set Sales Stage to 'Needs Analysis', Probability to 10%, and add '[Q1-AUDIT] Held - critical support escalation' to Description.

Rule 3 — Major ticket: If the Organization has open Major-severity tickets but no Critical ones (and deal is not past-due), reduce Probability by 20 points (minimum 5%), and add '[Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted - major support issue' to Description.

Do not modify deals whose Organizations have no qualifying tickets and whose close dates are in the future.

After processing all deals, create a report titled 'Q1 2026 Pipeline Reconciliation' in Reports as a Tabular Report on the Potentials module.

critical_ticket_orgs.ticket: CRITICAL: Fleet GPS tracking system - complete outage since 03/17
CRITICAL: EHR patient data sync failure - 72hr data gap

major_ticket_orgs.ticket: Production line IoT sensor calibration drift affecting QA
Quarterly compliance report generation failing since Feb update

precedence_test.note: Atlas has BOTH Critical and Major tickets — Critical rule takes precedence
